# Currency Derivatives Trading

> FX derivatives trading with forwards, swaps, options, close-out auctions

**Category:** Trading ¬∑ **Version:** 1.0.0 ¬∑ **Tags:** derivatives ¬∑ fx ¬∑ currency

## What this does

FX derivatives trading with forwards, swaps, options, close-out auctions

Specifies 4 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **currency_pair** *(text, required)* ‚ÄĒ Currency pair (USDZAR, EURZAR)
- **contract_code** *(text, required)* ‚ÄĒ Contract code
- **contract_type** *(select, required)* ‚ÄĒ Type
- **expiry_date** *(date, required)* ‚ÄĒ Expiry date
- **forward_rate** *(number, optional)* ‚ÄĒ Forward rate
- **notional_amount** *(number, required)* ‚ÄĒ Notional amount
- **order_type** *(select, required)* ‚ÄĒ Order type
- **settlement_type** *(select, required)* ‚ÄĒ Settlement method

## What must be true

- **trading ‚Üí fxm_sessions:** Continuous 08:00-17:00 SAST. Opening auction 07:50-08:00. FX close out auction mandatory at 17:00 each business day. Volatility auctions on price circuit breaker.
- **trading ‚Üí forward_trading:** Quoted as outright rate (spot + forward points). Tenor basis: SP, TN, 1W-12M+. Settlement via banking (SWIFT, local nostro). T+n settlement per tenor.
- **trading ‚Üí fx_swap_trading:** Buy spot + sell forward (or reverse). Near leg T+0, far leg T+n. Basis quoted as swap points. Interest differential accrued per spec.
- **trading ‚Üí option_trading:** European style FX options. Calls and puts on forwards/spot. Strike in exchange rate. Exercise at expiry if ITM; automatic settlement.
- **trading ‚Üí close_out_auction:** Daily 17:00 FX close out. Finalizes day's positions. EOD rates published 17:15. Spot rates published 10:00, 11:30, EOD. All used for daily MTM.

## Success & failure scenarios

**‚úÖ Success paths**

- **Fx Forward Order Insert** ‚ÄĒ when currency_pair in ["USDZAR","EURZAR","GBPZAR"]; notional_amount gt 0; forward_rate gt 0, then FX forward order accepted in order book.
- **Fx Swap Initiation** ‚ÄĒ when contract_type eq "W"; notional_amount gt 0, then Swap created; both legs queued for settlement.
- **Fx Close Out Auction Uncross** ‚ÄĒ when market_session eq "FX_CLOSE_OUT"; uncross_price exists, then FX close out auction determines EOD rates; positions marked to market.
- **Banking Settlement Confirmed** ‚ÄĒ when settlement_status eq "initiated"; banking_confirmation exists, then Settlement confirmed; proceeds to completion on settlement date.

## Errors it can return

- `CURRENCY_PAIR_NOT_SUPPORTED` ‚ÄĒ Currency pair not actively traded
- `INVALID_TENOR` ‚ÄĒ Settlement tenor not available
- `FX_SETTLEMENT_FAILED` ‚ÄĒ Banking system failed to settle FX delivery
- `CLOSE_OUT_AUCTION_FAILED` ‚ÄĒ FX close out auction engine error

## Events

**`order.submitted`**
  Payload: `order_id`, `currency_pair`, `amount`

**`forward.initiated`**
  Payload: `forward_id`, `pair`, `rate`, `tenor`

**`swap.initiated`**
  Payload: `swap_id`, `near_leg`, `far_leg`

**`settlement.spot_initiated`**
  Payload: `settlement_id`, `amount`, `rate`

**`close_out_auction.ended`**
  Payload: `currency_pair`, `close_out_rate`

## Connects to

- **derivatives-market-overview** *(required)*
